description: airSlate, branded in these developer docs as altaFlow, provides document workflow automation including document generation, web forms, e-signatures, workflow execution, team management, webhooks, and usage stats. Its platform is used to embed and automate document-centric business processes in other applications.
summary: airslate.com exposes one documented REST API surface at https://api.airslate.io/v1 for document workflow automation; it uses Bearer access tokens obtained by registering an app in the DevHub and completing one of several OAuth 2.0-style grant flows.
